# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Write Linkerd Server and ServerAuthorization resources for microservices. Define which services can communicate with each other. Configure port-based and service account-based authorization rules. This is for our zero-trust service mesh.
# Category: linkerd_authz_missing

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: my-service-server
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  routeMatchers:
    - method: GET
      pathRegex: /endpoint/*
  auth:
    identity:
      trustDomain: example.com
    peerIdentity:
      trustDomains:
        - example.com

---

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: my-service-authz
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  serverRef:
    name: my-service-server
    namespace: my-namespace
  allowedSources:
    - trustDomain: example.com
      namespaces:
        - my-namespace
  portLevelIngress:
    - port: 8080
      identitySelector:
        matchLabels:
          app: my-other-service

---

apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha2
kind: ServerAuthorization
metadata:
  name: my-other-service-authz
  namespace: my-namespace
spec:
  serverRef:
    name: my-other-service-server
    namespace: my-namespace
  allowedSources:
    - trustDomain: example.com
      namespaces:
        - my-namespace
  portLevelIngress:
    - port: 8081
      identitySelector:
        matchLabels:
          app: my-service
